case_title: GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY vs. CORDONERO, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CORDONERO, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-11-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-13-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-21-1995
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-25-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORDONERO, RICHARD
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-11-1995, CONTINUED TO JUL-10-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT BY 7/3/95. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PAYABLE IN INSTALLMENTS FILED
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-10-1995, CONTINUED TO JUL-10-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF PAYMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE FEE IRONMOUNTAIN RUSH FILED BY DEFENDANT CORDONERO, RICHARD

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORDONERO, RICHARD $12,620.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,620.75 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY #2, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES INSURANCE COMPANY
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO PAY JUDGMENT ON INSTALLMENTS GRANTED BY JUDGE GARCIA. SEE STIPULATION FOR TERMS AND CONDITIONS, ORDER
